title: arctostaphylos columbiana var. tracyi
intro: Arctostaphylos columbiana var. tracyi, also known as Tracy's manzanita, is a shrub species native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Tracy's manzanita include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, due to its rich content of antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Tracy's manzanita include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties for various health applications.
